summary: Android app/service that listens to Instagram notifications and sends an automatic reply via notification actions.
architectural_notes: Use Android NotificationListenerService (android.permission.BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE) with a manifest-declared service and intent-filter for android.service.notification.NotificationListenerService.
Filter StatusBarNotification by packageName == com.instagram.android and trigger auto-reply via notification actionIntent with android.intent.extra.TEXT.

existing_features.title: Create a frontend page that displays the provided Android Manifest service declaration and the provided Kotlin `InstaNotificationService : NotificationListenerService` code as formatted, syntax-highlighted code blocks, including a one-click "Copy" button for each snippet.
Apply a coherent visual theme across the page (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) suitable for a developer-focused code snippet viewer, avoiding blue/purple as primary brand colors.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement InstaNotificationService using NotificationListenerService to detect Instagram notifications and send an auto-reply via the notification's Reply action.

projectName: Add web UI to display Android InstaNotificationService auto-reply snippet
